featuresPage.title: APAI Features | VIN Decode, AI Chat, Quotes & NAGS Data
featuresPage.description: Discover APAI's powerful features: Instant VIN decoding, AI Chat, professional PDF quotes, and real-time NAGS data. Scale your glass shop for just $99/mo.
featuresPage.headerTitlePrefix: Everything You Need to Run Your
featuresPage.headerDescription: From the first quote to the final payment, APAI provides a comprehensive suite of tools designed for speed, accuracy, and growth.

quoting.title: Precision Quoting: Win the Job and Maximize Profit.
quoting.subHeadline: Generate professional, accurate estimates instantly, reducing administrative time and eliminating costly errors.
quoting.feature1Desc: Utilize the NHTSA VPIC API for guaranteed accurate vehicle glass search by Year, Make, Model, Style, or VIN. We classify parts using industry-standard NAGS codes (DB, DD, DQ, DR, DV, DW).
quoting.feature2Desc: Integrate real-time pricing from NAGS database and define custom labor cost entries to ensure your quote always reflects current market values and your required margins.
quoting.feature3Desc: Automatically apply custom labor rates, tax percentages, and discounts, presenting the customer with a clear, professional final price.
quoting.feature4Desc: Generate branded, easy-to-read Quote documents that customers can approve quickly via email or SMS.

workOrder.title: Mobile Management: Empower Your Technicians, Anywhere.
workOrder.subHeadline: APAI is built for the mobile service economy, giving remote installers and shop technicians the tools they need to complete jobs efficiently.
workOrder.feature1Desc: Quotes instantly convert to detailed Work Orders, pre-populated with customer and vehicle data. Technicians access all details on their mobile device.
workOrder.feature2Desc: Technicians log start and end times right in the app, automatically tracking and logging labor hours against the job.
workOrder.feature3Desc: Capture mandatory Before/After photos of the vehicle glass and collect the customer's signature electronically upon job completion, securing your records.
workOrder.feature4Desc: Customize access for every team member, from Shop Owner and Admin to Mobile Technician and Technician, ensuring everyone has the right level of control.

invoicing.title: Financial Control: Simplify Billing and Accelerate Cash Flow.
invoicing.subHeadline: Turn completed jobs into paid invoices with robust tracking, insurance management, and automated follow-up.
invoicing.feature1Desc: Easily log and track critical details like the insurance claim number and customer deductible directly on the invoice.
invoicing.feature2Desc: Clearly track the status of every invoice: Partial Paid, Paid, or Overdue. Set custom payment terms (e.g., Net 30) for clarity.
invoicing.feature3Desc: When an invoice reaches the Overdue status, APAI automatically sends payment reminder emails, significantly reducing late payments.
invoicing.feature4Desc: Access reports that analyze job profitability, technician performance, and revenue trends, helping you make data-driven decisions.

engagement.title: Seamless Booking: Capture Leads and Chat Live.
engagement.subHeadline: Provide your customers with a modern, branded experience from their first inquiry to the final job.
engagement.feature1Desc: Easily embed our clean, optimized quote request widget directly onto your shop's existing website to capture high-intent visual quote requests instantly.
engagement.feature2Desc: Engage with visitors in real-time through an integrated live chat service that connects straight to your APAI dashboard for instant lead conversion.
engagement.feature3Desc: Make the widget yours by customizing colors, maps, and styling to perfectly match your brand's aesthetic and website design.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about APAI features and functionality
faq.q1: What document types does APAI support?
faq.a1: APAI supports multiple document types including Quotes, Invoices, Work Orders, and Composite Service Documents. Each document type includes customizable fields, automatic calculations, and export capabilities to PDF format.
faq.q2: Can I manage multiple customers and vehicles?
faq.a2: Yes! APAI features a comprehensive Customer Management system where you can store unlimited customer profiles with contact information, phone numbers, emails, vehicles, and service history. Quickly search and filter customers by name, phone, or email for easy access.
faq.q3: How does the scheduling system work?
faq.a3: The integrated scheduling system allows you to manage appointments, assign tasks to employees, and track service dates. View your schedule in Calendar, Kanban Board, or Table view. Never miss a scheduled appointment with built-in notifications.
faq.q4: Can I track payments and invoices?
faq.a4: Absolutely! APAI includes advanced payment tracking with payment history, multiple payment methods, overdue tracking, and sales reports. Easily monitor which invoices are paid, pending, or overdue. Generate comprehensive sales reports for any date range.
faq.q5: Is there mobile support or do I need a desktop?
faq.a5: APAI is web-based and responsive, working on both desktop and mobile devices. You can access quotes, customer information, and schedules from your phone or tablet on the job site, making it perfect for on-the-go business management.
faq.a6: The platform is built for the auto glass industry in the USA, specifically serving auto glass shop owners, repair shop owners, and technicians. Whether you are a one-man mobile operation or a multi-location enterprise, APAI scales to fit your needs.
faq.a7: APAI is currently offered at a straightforward, flat rate of $99 per month/per user. We believe in simple pricing with no hidden fees or "per-lead" charges.
faq.q8: What is SmartVIN technology and how does it help me?
faq.a8: SmartVIN is our proprietary AI decoding technology. Unlike basic VIN deciphering, SmartVIN automatically identifies the exact glass, specific sensors (like rain or light sensors), and ADAS requirements for a vehicle. This eliminates manual cross-referencing and ensures you never show up to a job site with the wrong part.
faq.a9: Yes. APAI provides instant access to National Auto Glass Specifications (NAGS) data, allowing you to generate 100% accurate quotes with current part numbers and industry-standard labor hours.
faq.q10: Can I see live pricing from my glass distributors?
faq.a10: Absolutely. APAI integrates with major distributors like Pilkington, giving you real-time access to parts availability and your specific wholesale pricing directly inside the quote builder.
faq.q11: Is there a mobile app for my technicians?
faq.a11: Yes, APAI is a mobile-first platform. Technicians can use the mobile interface on the road to view job details, capture "before and after" photos, collect digital signatures, and update job status in real-time.
faq.q12: How does APAI handle insurance billing?
faq.a12: APAI features instant EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) billing. You can manage every invoice and submit insurance claims directly through the platform, automating the communication loop and helping you get paid faster.
faq.q13: Can I customize the contact form on my own website?
faq.a13: Yes! APAI provides a custom contact form feature that you can embed on your website. This form allows customers to enter their VIN and select their glass type directly, flowing that lead data straight into your APAI dashboard for one-click quoting.
faq.q14: How long does it take to get started?
faq.a14: You can start a free trial and begin exploring the platform immediately. Because our system is cloud-based and intuitive, most shops are up and running within a single day.
faq.q15: How do I get support if I have a question?
faq.a15: Our dedicated support team is ready to help. You can reach us anytime at support@autopaneai.com for assistance with your account, technical questions, or training needs.

footer.tagline: Professional auto glass pricing & quoting platform built for modern repair shops.

aboutPage.missionText: APAI was founded to solve the core inefficiencies that plague the auto glass industry: inaccurate quotes, paper-based work orders, and slow payment cycles. We provide a single, cloud-based platform that handles the entire service flow, allowing shop owners and remote installers to focus on service delivery, not paperwork.
aboutPage.foundersSubtitle: The visionary team combining industry experience with cutting-edge technology.

founders.name: Suyog Khedekar
founders.description: With over six years of experience owning and operating GlassFixit in the competitive California market, Suyog is the "voice of the customer." He understands the nuances of NAGS codes, insurance deductibles, and the daily headaches of shop management. His mission is to solve the pricing issues and operational gaps that prevent glass shops from reaching their full potential.

founders.name: Priyank Acharekar
founders.description: Priyank is the architect behind APAI’s intelligence. An expert AI and Cloud Engineer, he brings hands-on experience in designing and deploying end-to-end Generative AI applications. With a background at TestSprint360, Priyank leverages AWS, Bedrock, and Python to ensure APAI’s backend is not only scalable and secure but also utilizes cutting-edge ML and data automation to make our quoting engine the smartest in the industry.

founders.name: Sanket Paithankar
founders.description: Sanket is the engine behind the APAI product experience. He owns the core engineering of the platform—from database and API design to the frontend interface. With a focus on clean architecture and high reliability, Sanket ensures that the software is fast, stable, and intuitive. He bridges the gap between complex technical requirements and the simple, easy-to-use features that shop owners and technicians rely on every day.

workflowSection.title: Workflow from Quote to Invoice
workflowSection.subtitle: Complete lifecycle management of every automotive glass service

steps.title: Create Quote
steps.desc: Generate professional quotes with customer info, vehicle details, glass parts, labor costs, and automatic pricing calculations in minutes.

steps.title: Approve & Convert
steps.desc: Customer reviews and accepts quote. System automatically converts to work order and schedules service with assigned technician.

steps.title: Execute Service
steps.desc: Technicians complete work in field with before/after photo documentation, time logging, and customer signature confirmation.

steps.title: Invoice & Track
steps.desc: Automatically generate invoices with payment tracking. Monitor partial payments, overdue invoices, and late fees all in one dashboard.

whyChooseSection.title: Why Choose APAI?
whyChooseSection.desc: APAI is purpose-built for the automotive glass industry. We understand your business challenges and provide solutions tailored to your success.

benefits.title: Instant Accuracy
benefits.desc: VIN lookup eliminates data entry errors and ensures correct parts matching.

benefits.title: Time Savings
benefits.desc: Automated quote generation and calculations reduce admin work by 70%.

benefits.title: Revenue Growth
benefits.desc: Professional quotes and follow-up improve conversion rates and customer retention.

benefits.title: Better Control
benefits.desc: Track every job from quote to invoice with complete visibility and reporting.

benefits.title: Scalability
benefits.desc: Manage growing teams and multiple locations without complexity.

valuePropSection.title: The APAI Difference
valuePropSection.subtitle: Stop Juggling Systems. Start Growing.
valuePropSection.desc: APAI is a specialized B2B SaaS platform designed exclusively for auto glass repair shops and mobile technicians to streamline the entire service lifecycle, turning quotes into paid invoices effortlessly.

quote.title: Quote with Precision
quote.focus: Instant, VIN-driven NAGS part identification built specifically for auto glass professionals.
quote.detail: APAI eliminates guesswork during quoting by automatically matching vehicle VINs to the correct NAGS glass part, features, and specifications. No more manual cross-checks, outdated catalogs, or incorrect part selection that leads to rework or losses.
quote.b1: Accurate windshield, back glass, and side glass identification every time
quote.b2: Real-time NAGS data ensures correct pricing and part compatibility
quote.b3: Reduces quoting time from minutes to seconds
quote.b4: Prevents costly ordering and installation errors

execute.title: Execute with Confidence
execute.focus: End-to-end digital work order management with full mobile support.
execute.detail: Move away from paper, WhatsApp notes, and fragmented systems. APAI provides a structured digital workflow from job approval to completion, accessible on mobile, tablet, or desktop — ideal for field technicians and shop managers alike.
execute.b1: Create and assign work orders instantly
execute.b2: Dispatch technicians with clear job details
execute.b3: Track labor hours, job status, and technician progress
execute.b4: Capture photos, signatures, and compliance documents on-site

paid.title: Get Paid Faster
paid.focus: Automated billing, insurance tracking, and payment follow-ups.
paid.detail: APAI streamlines the most painful part of auto glass operations — payments. From invoice generation to insurance coordination and customer reminders, everything is tracked and automated so nothing slips through the cracks.
paid.b1: Generate accurate invoices directly from completed work orders
paid.b2: Track insurance claims and approval status
paid.b3: Monitor outstanding balances in real time
paid.b4: Send automatic payment and overdue reminders

accuracy.title: Unmatched Accuracy from the Ground Up
accuracy.subtitle: Everything you need to run your business efficiently

kf1.title: 100% VIN Accuracy
kf1.desc: Our integration with the NHTSA VPIC API ensures perfect vehicle identification every time, matching Year, Make, Model, and Style to the correct glass part.

kf2.title: NAGS Code Integration
kf2.desc: Access the absolute complete National Auto Glass Specifications (NAGS) catalog for real-time pricing and labor hours, ensuring maximum profitability on every job.

kf3.title: Quote-to-Invoice Flow
kf3.desc: Effortlessly convert an approved quote into a Work Order and finally an Invoice with a single click—no duplicate data entry.

aiChatbot.title: AI Chatbot
aiChatbot.desc: An AI Chatbot integrated into your website allowing visitors to interact with the system in real time, answering queries and capturing leads 24/7.

security.title: Security & Reliability: Your Business Data is Our Top Priority
security.desc: All data is encrypted, securely stored in the cloud, and automatically backed up. Our role-based access control protects sensitive information, giving you peace of mind.

step1.title: Enter Customer & Vehicle
step1.desc: Select or create customer, lookup vehicle by VIN or manual entry. All info auto-populated for accuracy.

step2.title: Select Glass Parts
step2.desc: Browse NAGS-classified glass parts by vehicle compatibility. See real-time pricing and available inventory.

step3.title: Add Labor & Calculate
step3.desc: Enter hourly rate and estimated hours. System auto-calculates totals with tax and discounts applied.

step4.title: Send or Convert
step4.desc: Send professional quote to customer or convert directly to work order. Track status until invoice paid.

featuresSection.title: Powerful Features Built for Your Business

vinLookup.title: VIN-Based Vehicle Lookup
vinLookup.desc: Instantly identify vehicles using 17-character VINs. Auto-populates year, make, model, and style for 100% accuracy through NHTSA VPIC API integration.

realTimePricing.title: Real-Time Pricing
realTimePricing.desc: Access up-to-date glass part pricing integrated with supplier databases. Automatic calculations for parts, labor, tax, and discounts in seconds.

professionalDocs.title: Professional Documents
professionalDocs.desc: Generate branded quotes, work orders, and invoices with customized pricing breakdowns, terms, and professional formatting ready to send to customers.

teamCollab.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollab.desc: Manage unlimited employees with role-based access control. Technicians, managers, sales teams, and administrators all work from one platform.

customerMgmt.title: Customer Management
customerMgmt.desc: Maintain detailed customer profiles, vehicle history, and service records. Track quotes, work orders, and invoices per customer for relationship management.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.desc: All data encrypted and stored securely in the cloud. Automatic backups, role-based access control, and compliance-ready infrastructure.

shopOwners.title: Shop Owners
shopOwners.desc: Manage your brick-and-mortar location with multiple staff members, handle billing, and scale your business.

mobileInstallers.title: Mobile Installers
mobileInstallers.desc: Work independently or lead a mobile team. Generate quotes on-the-go and manage service delivery.

repairShops.title: Repair Shops
repairShops.desc: Streamline auto glass repairs with professional documentation, team coordination, and customer management.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your auto glass business

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.howItWorksDesc: We've made it easy for you to transition from a manual "grind" to a streamlined, AI-powered operation. Here is what happens after you hit submit:
contact.step1Desc: Fill out the form with your company name and contact info. Whether you are an existing shop or a new business, we want to know where you are in your journey.
contact.step2Title: Sign Up for a Free Trial
contact.step2Desc: Get full access to the APAI platform immediately. No strings attached—take 30 days to explore the VIN-driven quoting, NAGS integration, and digital work orders to see the impact on your bottom line.
contact.step3Desc: We’ll help you understand how to integrate your NAGS data and NHTSA VPIC access so your quoting process is 100% accurate from day one.
contact.whyConnectDesc: Choosing the right software is a big decision for your shop. When you reach out to our team, you’re gaining more than just technical support—you’re gaining a partner in growth.
contact.expertGuidanceDesc: Speak with specialists who understand the specific challenges of the auto glass industry
contact.tailoredSolutionsDesc: Whether you have a single mobile unit or a multi-state operation, we show you how to set up Role-Based Management so your team can work independently.
contact.zeroPressureDemosDesc: See exactly how the AI-driven VIN decoding works and how it can save you hours of manual cross-referencing every week.
contact.rapidSupportDesc: Have a specific question about NAGS integration or billing? Our support team is dedicated to getting your shop up and running without downtime.

contact.testOutPrompt: Want to test out APAI? We will show you around, or you can drive the bus!
contact.emailUsDesc: For any inquiries, support, or feedback, feel free to email us. Our team will get back to you within 24–48 hours.
